product_overview: UniRide v2 is a university transportation platform for managing student transit operations through an admin console and a mobile app. It supports administrative oversight, trip booking, trip tracking, payments, history, and license activation for users.
core_goals: Sign in to access the admin console or mobile app
Review operational dashboard metrics for the transit platform
Manage transportation-related records from the admin interface
Book a trip from the mobile app
Track an active trip in real time
Process a trip payment from the mobile app
Review past trips from the mobile app
Activate a mobile license from the app

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to access the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: View platform-wide operational statistics after signing in.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View dashboard statistics cards -> Review total users, drivers, and trips counts -> Review monthly revenue

features.name: Driver Management
features.description: Manage driver records from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /drivers -> View the driver list -> Review driver records

features.name: Trip Management
features.description: Manage trip records from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips -> View the trip list -> Review trip records

features.name: Route Management
features.description: Manage transit routes from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /routes -> View the route list -> Review route records

features.name: Subscription Management
features.description: Manage subscriptions from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /subscriptions -> View subscription records -> Review subscription details

features.name: License Batch Management
features.description: Manage batches of licenses from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /license_batches -> View license batch records -> Review batch details

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Adjust application settings from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Review available settings -> Update settings

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Inspect analytical trends and metrics from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> View analytics charts and metrics -> Review performance trends

features.name: Activity Log Viewer
features.description: Inspect recorded system activity from the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /activity-log -> View activity log entries -> Review recent actions

features.name: Mobile Home and Navigation
features.description: Access the authenticated mobile home screen and primary app tabs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the mobile home screen -> Review available tab-based sections

features.name: Mobile Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password on the mobile app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See authenticated mobile experience

features.name: Trip Booking
features.description: Book a trip from the mobile app.
user_flows: Navigate to /booking -> Review booking options -> Select trip details -> Submit booking request -> See booking confirmation

features.name: Real-time Trip Tracking
features.description: Track an active trip in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to /tracking/\$tripId] -> View live trip status -> Monitor trip location updates

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Complete a trip payment from the mobile app.
user_flows: Navigate to /payment -> Review payment details -> Enter payment information -> Submit payment -> See payment confirmation

features.name: Trip History
features.description: Review previous trips from the mobile app.
user_flows: Navigate to /trip-history -> View trip history list -> Review past trip records

features.name: License Activation
features.description: Activate a mobile license from the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /activate -> Enter license information -> Submit activation request -> See activation status

tech_stack.ui_library: MUI (Material-UI) for admin, React Native components for mobile

tech_stack.other: React 19, Refine, Supabase, Zustand, React Hook Form, i18next

routes.description: Admin login page with email/password authentication

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials via Supabase auth
user_interactions: Click Sign in button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard showing platform statistics and metrics
user_interactions: See total users, drivers, trips counts
